title: Microsoft is testing free, ad-supported cloud gaming for Xbox Insiders
excerpt: Xbox Insiders can stream certain games from their libraries for free with an ad-supported cloud gaming option Microsoft is testing.
content_html:
Stevie Bonifield

is a news writer covering all things consumer tech. Stevie started out at Laptop Mag writing news and reviews on hardware, gaming, and AI.

Xbox Insiders can stream games from their libraries for free in ad-supported streaming sessions starting today. The free streaming sessions are limited to games you already own, and sessions are capped at one hour. However, ads will only play “before sessions begin.” It’s also optional — you won’t need to watch ads if you have a paid cloud gaming subscription.

Microsoft says the ad-supported streaming option will only be available for a limited time during a “test period.” It previously began internally testing an ad-supported version of Xbox Cloud Gaming late last year, with sources telling The Verge at the time that the test included about two minutes of preroll ads before streaming sessions.

Around the same time, Microsoft also increased Game Pass prices, but added unlimited cloud gaming to its lowest-priced Game Pass Essential subscription, which costs $9.99 per month. Previously, you needed a Game Pass Ultimate subscription for Xbox Cloud Gaming. Microsoft says the goal of its current test for ad-supported streaming is to further expand affordable ways to play Xbox games. Ad tiers have become increasingly common on video streaming platforms over recent years — the addition of ads on Xbox’s streaming service could signal a similar shift coming to gaming subscriptions.

Additionally, Microsoft notes that cloud gaming could “help Xbox One owners play newer games built for Xbox Series X/S” without needing to buy a new console. The news comes as Xbox is in a state of upheaval, including mass layoffs, studio closures, and a pivot back toward the fan-favorite Fallout franchise. On top of that, Xbox console prices are set to increase by upwards of $100 starting on August 1st.

Follow topics and authors from this story to see more like this in your personalized homepage feed and to receive email updates.

  • Stevie Bonifield

content_html_zh:
史蒂维·博尼菲尔德

是一位涵盖消费科技所有领域的新闻撰稿人。 Stevie 最初在 Laptop Mag 撰写有关硬件、游戏和人工智能的新闻和评论。

从今天开始，Xbox Insider 可以在广告支持的流媒体会话中免费从他们的库中流式传输游戏。 免费流媒体会话仅限于您已经拥有的游戏，并且会话上限为一小时。 但是，广告只会在“会话开始之前”播放。 它也是可选的——如果您订阅了付费云游戏，则无需观看广告。

微软表示，广告支持的流媒体选项仅在“测试期间”的有限时间内可用。 去年年底，该公司开始内部测试 Xbox 云游戏的广告支持版本，当时有消息人士告诉 The Verge，测试包括在流媒体会话之前播放大约两分钟的预卷广告。

大约在同一时间，微软还提高了 Game Pass 的价格，但在其价格最低的 Game Pass Essential 订阅中添加了无限量的云游戏，每月费用为 9.99 美元。 以前，您需要 Xbox Cloud Gaming 的 Game Pass Ultimate 订阅。 微软表示，目前测试广告支持的流媒体的目标是进一步扩展 Xbox 游戏的经济实惠方式。 近年来，广告层级在视频流媒体平台上变得越来越普遍——Xbox 流媒体服务上广告的添加可能预示着游戏订阅即将发生类似的转变。

此外，微软指出，云游戏可以“帮助 Xbox One 用户玩专为 Xbox Series X/S 打造的新游戏”，而无需购买新游戏机。 这一消息发布之际，Xbox 正处于剧变状态，包括大规模裁员、工作室关闭，以及回归粉丝喜爱的《辐射》系列。 最重要的是，从 8 月 1 日开始，Xbox 主机的价格将上涨 100 美元以上。

  • 史蒂维·博尼菲尔德
